name: README Generator
description: Analyzes a repository and generates a complete, accurate README: description, features, install, usage, configuration, and contribution sections derived from the actual code and manifests.
author: ClaudeStudio Docs Pack

steps.title: Analyze repository
steps.prompt: Analyze {{target_dir}}: read the package manifest, entry points, scripts, config files, existing docs, and the directory layout. Determine the project's purpose, primary language/framework, how it is installed, how it is run, its main features, configuration/env vars, and how to run tests. Capture concrete, verifiable facts only; do not invent features.

steps.title: Write the README
steps.prompt: Write a complete README.md in a {{tone}} tone for the project (name: {{project_name}} if provided, otherwise the inferred name). Include, where applicable: a one-line description, optional status badges (include = {{badges}}), Features, Requirements, Installation, Quick Start / Usage with real commands, Configuration, Project Structure, Testing, Contributing, and License. Use accurate commands taken from the analysis. Mark anything you could not verify with a clearly labeled TODO rather than guessing.
